queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis investigates the relationship between no known savings account status and decreased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Research examines the determinants of credit risk associated with the absence of a checking account and its contribution to loan default.
Studies explore the statistical impact of education as a loan purpose on credit risk drivers and default likelihood.
